description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular head with beveled edges and a smooth, matte finish, giving it a robust and solid appearance. The head is adorned with a prominent triquetra (Celtic knot) symbol engraved on two opposing faces, while the other two faces are plain. The top of the head has a circular, slightly recessed area, possibly for decorative or functional purposes. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and wrapped with a dark, ribbed grip, likely designed for enhanced hold and comfort. The base of the handle is capped with a squared-off end, providing a secure stop for the user's hand. The overall design suggests a heavy-duty tool, possibly inspired by mythological or fantasy motifs.
description: A robust hammer with a large, rectangular head featuring engraved triquetra symbols and a straight, ribbed handle for grip. The matte finish and solid build evoke a heavy-duty, possibly mythological tool.
description_view_0: Front view shows the engraved triquetra symbol on the head and the ribbed handle directly below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the plain face of the hammer head and the squared-off end of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying another triquetra symbol and the handle's grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other plain face of the head and the handle's end.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with a ribbed, rubberized grip for enhanced hold and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Large, rectangular sledge-type head with beveled edges and two engraved triquetra symbols on opposing faces.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Triquetra symbol engraved; no brand name visible.
